name: Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, molasses, and egg. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking soda, ginger, cloves, and cinnamon. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Shape dough into one-inch balls. Roll balls in granulated sugar to coat. Place balls two inches apart on unprepared baking sheets. Bake for 10 minutes or till edges are set and tops are crackled.
